title: Protea conocarpodendron
taxonomy: Protea conocarpodendron is a species within the genus Protea, which is a group of flowering plants in the family Proteaceae. This family is a group of flowering plants native to South Africa, Australia, and New Zealand. The Proteaceae family is further classified under the clade core eudicots and the larger clade angiosperms. The plant's classification also places it within the order Proteales and the clade rosids. In the broader sense, Protea conocarpodendron falls under the kingdom Plantae and the domain Eukarya.

intro: Protea conocarpodendron, also known as Red Protea or King Protea, is a species of flowering plant native to South Africa, belonging to the Proteaceae family.
